ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client or stakeholder */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "estimated_effort" REAL /* Estimated effort in hours */,
  "actual_effort" REAL /* Actual effort spent in hours */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the project (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the project details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the repository belongs to */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "repo_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit in the repository */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Current active branch in the repository */,
  "last_build_status" TEXT /* Status of the last build (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "build_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of builds (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "ci_cd_pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CI/CD pipeline used */,
  "last_build_date" TEXT /* Date of the last build */,
  "last_build_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the last build in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the issue was found */,
  "package" TEXT /* Package name where the issue is located */,
  "file" TEXT /* File path where the issue is located */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the issue (1-5, 1 being the highest) */,
  "line" INTEGER /* Line number where the issue is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "rule_set" TEXT /* Rule set used to identify the issue */,
  "rule" TEXT /* Specific rule that identified the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was last updated */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue (e.g., critical, major, minor) */,
  "estimated_resolution_time" REAL /* Estimated time to resolve the issue in hours */,
  "actual_resolution_time" REAL /* Actual time taken to resolve the issue in hours */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the issue on the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "detected_by" TEXT /* Tool or user who detected the issue */,
  "detected_version" TEXT /* Version of the code where the issue was detected */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the issue */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_rule FOREIGN KEY ("rule") REFERENCES rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_rule_set FOREIGN KEY ("rule_set") REFERENCES rule_sets ("rule_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rule_sets" (
  "rule_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule set */,
  "rule_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rule set */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the rule set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the rule set was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the rule set */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date the rule set was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rule set is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_sets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_sets_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rule set the rule belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the rule was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the rule */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date the rule was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rule is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA engineer, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created, updated, resolved) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the action was automated */,
  "tool_used" TEXT /* Tool used for the action (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is private */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment was generated by an automated process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the issue is assigned to */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the issue */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was assigned */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the assignment was automated */,
  "assignment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the assignment (e.g., high priority, task owner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tags_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the version was created automatically */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_versions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., time to resolve, complexity) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., automated tool, manual input) */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the metric was collected automatically */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_metrics_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the report is associated with */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report covers */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report was generated automatically */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_reports_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
